<system>
<meta>
<id>test-brain</id>
</meta>

<purpose>Test purpose for golden-file snapshot.</purpose>

<provides>Core capabilities for testing.</provides>

<provides>Memory management iron rules.</provides>


# Iron Rules
## No-secrets (CRITICAL)
NEVER hardcode secrets in source files.
- **why**: Secrets in source code leak to version control.
- **on_violation**: Remove immediately and rotate credentials.

## Determinism (HIGH)
All builds must be deterministic.
- **why**: Non-determinism causes drift between environments.



# Test first
Write tests before implementation.
- PHPUnit test case
- `step-1`: Create test file
- `step-2`: Run and see it fail


# Scan first
Always scan source files before generating code.

</system>
